raw:
## Completed
Implemented the Gate-1 team question packet channel for team-routed scorer assumptions. It stays advisory-only: Gate 1 approval proceeds on assumptions unless the founder later rejects with a team veto/correction.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/teampacket.ts` - new pure formatter for capped paste-able team question packets.
- `extensions/foreman/planner.ts` - appends the team packet after scored assumptions in Gate-1 plan rendering.
- `extensions/foreman/index.ts` - records the packet text on the `gate1_awaiting` ledger event.
- `extensions/foreman/test/teampacket_test.sh` - headless tests for filtering, ordering, cap, content, and wiring guards.
- `.pi/foreman.json` - added `teampacket_test.sh` to the per-round verify gate.
- `extensions/foreman/docs/INTERNALS.md` - documented the assume-unless-vetoed Gate-1/Gate-2 flow.

## How To Verify
```bash
grep -q "claude-opus-4-8:xhigh" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/scorer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/teampacket_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/docer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh
```

## Notes
Verify command above was run and passed.
